title: Daily Briefing — Wednesday, May 27
tldr: Anthropic announced its $65B Series H at a $965B valuation (led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, Sequoia) — overtaking OpenAI.
Anthropic opened a Milan office for European enterprise/research/devs.
OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner.

blocks.p: $65B Series H at a $965B valuation, making Anthropic worth more than OpenAI. The company also teased Claude Mythos Preview (advanced cybersecurity capabilities) for a select set of companies.
blocks.why: Funding of this scale buys the compute that decides who stays at the frontier.

blocks.p: A new Milan office signals a serious enterprise push into Europe (alongside the EU's tightening transparency rules).
OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents — useful external validation if you're choosing a vendor for agentic coding.
blocks.doIt: If procuring agentic coding tools, pull the latest Gartner placement into your vendor comparison.
